description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated male figure with a muscular build, draped in a cloak that covers his shoulders and back. The figure's head is adorned with a crown of thorns, and his facial expression appears somber and contemplative. His right arm rests on his right knee, while his left arm crosses over his lap, with both hands loosely clasped. The figure is barefoot and sits on a rectangular plinth, which features an inscription on the front face. The surface of the sculpture is weathered, with visible signs of aging and patina, suggesting it is made of stone or concrete. The back of the sculpture shows the draped cloak and textured hair, with no additional ornamentation.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a seated, cloaked male figure with a crown of thorns and a somber expression, resting on a rectangular plinth with an inscription.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, crown of thorns, crossed arms, and the inscription on the plinth.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the muscular arm, draped cloak, and the figure's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, textured hair, and the cloak draped over the shoulders.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, bent knee, and the way the cloak falls along the side.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure with a crown of thorns
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
